name: Monochrome Print — Government
description: Off-white paper with ink-black serif text and a single deep government-blue accent. High-contrast print editorial vibe adapted for serious government systems. Quiet, authoritative, trustworthy.
descriptionZh: 微暖白底 + 墨黑衬线正文 + 单一深政务蓝强调色. 高对比印刷编辑气质, 适配严肃政务系统. 沉静、权威、可信赖.
